subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou hast ever been and wilt ever remain, through the loving-kindness of the Eternal Beloved, sustained by the Kawthar of love of Him Who is the Goal of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم تزل و لاتزال بعنایات محبوب بیزوال از کوثر محبت مقصود عالمیان
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
